activity.body: Karen Chen, Discharge Planner at UCSF Mission Bay — booked intro for Thu 2:30 PM.

messages.body:
Hi Karen,

I run Family Care SF — small family-owned home-care agency in SF, since 2001. Caregivers in English, Russian, Tagalog, and Spanish. We cover overnights, weekends, post-discharge, and dementia.

If you've got a discharge that needs help this week, send it my way. I'll get you a yes or no within a couple hours, and we can usually start same-day or next-day if it's a fit.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — that'd actually be useful. Weekend discharges fall through on us too often. Languages and overnight coverage matter. Thursday afternoon work for a quick call?

Thursday's good. We've got caregivers in English, Russian, Tagalog, and Spanish — overnights and weekends are kind of our thing. 2:30 work for you?

Alex
Confirmed — Thu May 14, 2:30 PM. Calendar invite sent.

activity.body: David Reyes, Elder Law at Reyes & Goldman — "send me your intake packet, I have two clients this week."

messages.body:
Hi David,

Alex Girsh — I run Family Care SF, a family-owned home-care agency here in SF (since 2001). Most of our work is private-pay, high-hour cases: caregivers in people's homes for personal care, companion, overnights. The kind of thing attorneys care about — caregivers who show up, clean documentation, and someone who picks up the phone before there's a problem.

If you've got a conservatorship or trust client who needs care started, send it over. I'll have a yes or no for you the same day.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Send me your intake packet — I have two clients this week. One in Pacific Heights, one in Forest Hill. Both private pay, both need reliable starts.

activity.body: Priya Anand, Social Worker at Laguna Honda — asked about overnight rates and minimum hours.

messages.body:
Hi Priya,

Alex Girsh, Family Care SF — family-owned home-care agency in SF since 2001. Caregivers fluent in Russian, Tagalog, and Spanish, plus English. Overnight and weekend coverage too.

If you've got a Laguna Honda discharge that needs a language match or a fast turnaround, send it my way. I'll get back to you the same morning, and we can usually start within a day if we have the right caregiver.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Thanks Alex. Two quick questions: what's the overnight rate, and what's your minimum hours per shift? We have a Russian-speaking discharge tomorrow if you can staff it.

activity.body: Dr. Marcus Hall, Geriatrician at One Medical Pacific Heights — wants to add us to his referral list.

thread.subject: If you keep a home-care list

messages.body:
Hi Dr. Hall,

Alex Girsh — I run Family Care SF, family-owned home-care agency in SF, since 2001. Caregivers in elderly patients' homes for personal care, companion, fall-risk support, overnights. Not nursing.

If you have a patient who needs help getting started at home, send them my way. I'll handle intake the same day and tell you up front if we can staff it.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Alex — yes, please add us to your one-pager list and I'll add you to mine. I refer about 3-5 a month. Do you cover Pacific Heights / Presidio Heights weekend overnights?

activity.body: Linda Okafor, Director at Rhoda Goldman Plaza — "not a fit right now, check back in Q3."

messages.body:
Hi Linda,

Alex Girsh, Family Care SF — family-owned home-care agency in SF since 2001. Private-duty: companion, personal care, overnights, fall-risk support.

If a resident at Rhoda Goldman ever needs more support than IL provides, send them my way. We can usually have a caregiver matched and started within 24 hours.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — appreciate the note. Not a fit right now; we have a preferred list locked in through Q2. Check back in Q3 and I'll take a real look.

activity.body: James Whitcombe, Admissions at Sequoias SF — 30-min call confirmed Mon 10:00 AM.

messages.body:
Hi James,

Alex Girsh — I run Family Care SF, family-owned home-care agency in SF since 2001. Private-duty for IL residents who need more support: companion, personal care, overnights, fall-risk help.

If you've got a Sequoias resident who's starting to need more than IL covers, send it my way. I can usually have a caregiver matched within a day.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — yes, worth a quick chat. Mon 10 AM PT works for me. 30 minutes. I'll send a Zoom link.

activity.body: Outreach batch sent — 52 contacts across hospitals, attorneys, and senior living.
Rachel Brodsky, Care Manager at Institute on Aging — open to a partnership conversation.

messages.body:
Hi Rachel,

Alex Girsh, Family Care SF — family-owned home-care agency in SF since 2001. Most of our work is high-hour, private-pay cases: caregivers who execute the plan reliably, leave clean notes, and call you when something changes.

If you've got a care plan that needs backup staffing this week, send it over. I'll have a yes or no for you within a couple hours.

Alex
(415) 225-4948
Alex — open to a partnership conversation. We have plans that drift because the staffing partner isn't responsive. If you're consistent on communication and weekend coverage, we should talk.

highlights.body: James Whitcombe, Admissions at Sequoias SF — 30-min call confirmed Mon 10:00 AM.
Karen Chen, Discharge Planner at UCSF Mission Bay — booked intro for Thu 2:30 PM.
David Reyes, Elder Law at Reyes & Goldman — "send me your intake packet, I have two clients this week."
Dr. Marcus Hall, Geriatrician at One Medical Pacific Heights — wants to add us to his referral list.
Rachel Brodsky, Care Manager at Institute on Aging — open to a partnership conversation.
Priya Anand, Social Worker at Laguna Honda — asked about overnight rates and minimum hours.

lastWeek.recommendation: Prioritize the 3 warm leads above this week — same-week follow-up tends to convert ~2× better than waiting.
